creator: alexey@kouznetsov.com
text:
# portupgrade -f memcached-1.4.15
[Reading data from pkg(8) ... - 222 packages found - done]
** Port directory not found: databases/memcached12
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        - databases/memcached12 (port directory error)
# ls -ld databases/memcached*
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel  512 21 сен 22:37 databases/memcached
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel  512 21 сен 22:36 databases/memcachedb

# egrep memcached MOVED
databases/memcached|databases/memcached12|2013-10-02|Unsupported upstream, consider using a newer version

I think there have to be
databases/memcached12|databases/memcached|2013-10-02|Unsupported upstream, consider using a newer version

for suggest to change 1.2.* versions to current 1.4.*

Fix: 

fix ports names in MOVED file
How-To-Repeat: make a portupgrade for memcached port
